subject: DREAM
body:
[ didn't know what  that "    ...    "   meant .   Just tell me  in computer 
lingo. ]
Thought this IMPORTANT or interesting.  Also ,had  dream  lastnight  clear as 
anything,   in color , with a spacious  pool that had subtle  low  fountains 
,.  GERRY  Lefcourt  talking to me , calm, confident, seemed to think all "not 
so bad"  especially after i  told him astrological   update on you .   He was 
going BUNGY JUMPING .   
What do you think ?  Just needed to tell you for some reason.
 
Marcia  M.



**************Ideas to please picky eaters. Watch video on AOL Living.

[ didn't know what  that "    ...   "   meant .   Just tell me  in computer lingo. ]
Thought this IMPORTANT or interesting.  Also ,had  dream  lastnight  clear as anything,   in color , with a spacious  pool that had subtle  low  fountains ,.  GERRY Lefcourt  talking to me , calm, confident, seemed to think all "not so bad" especially after i  told him astrological   update on you .  He was going BUNGY JUMPING .  
What do you think ?  Just needed to tell you for some reason.
 
Marcia M.
